channel.title: Okf on Greg Herlein
channel.description: Recent content in Okf on Greg Herlein

item.title: Procedures Travel. Knowledge Stays Home.
item.description: A couple weeks ago I wrote that your organization has to learn as fast as your best AI adopter. Externalize, combine, socialize, internalize. Run Nonaka’s spiral or get left behind. A bunch of you wrote back with the same question: okay, but where does the knowledge actually go?
